words.definition: Occurring or active during the daytime.

words.definition: Lasting or existing for a long or infinite time.

words.definition: Lasting for a very brief time.

words.definition: In or for the intervening period.
Living or occurring at the same time.

words.definition: Of or belonging to the time before the biblical Flood; extremely old.

words.definition: No longer produced or used; out of date.

words.definition: Belonging to the period before written records.

words.definition: Relating to the present or recent times.

words.definition: Existing or occurring at the same time.

words.definition: Occurring or operating at the same time.
Following one after the other in a series.

words.definition: Occurring at irregular intervals; not continuous.

words.definition: Originating in the distant past; very old.

words.definition: A pause or gap in a sequence.

words.definition: One of the two times a year when day and night are of equal length.

words.definition: A period of a thousand years.

words.definition: Every two months or twice a month.
